name: SES AI Corp
summary: PART I Overview We are a leading developer and manufacturer of high-performance, AI-enhanced Lithium-Metal (Li-Metal) and Lithium-ion (Li-ion) rechargeable battery technologies and battery materials for Energy Storage Systems (ESS), Urban Air Mobility (UAM), drones, robotics, electric vehicles (EVs), and other applications.
